title: Remove Sanskrit — keep only Urdu in languages/subjects

requirements.summary: Remove Sanskrit from all site pages and components, leaving only Urdu and other subjects intact
acceptanceCriteria: The word 'Sanskrit' does not appear anywhere on the site — in subject lists, language lists, curriculum sections, or any other context.
Urdu remains listed wherever it was previously shown alongside Sanskrit.
All other subjects and languages that were listed (apart from Sanskrit) are unchanged.
Changes are applied across all pages and components: AcademicsPage, FacultyPage, AboutPage, HomePage, and any other file that referenced Sanskrit.

file_operations.description: Remove 'Sanskrit' from the subjects array in the SubjectsSection component, leaving Urdu, English, Mathematics, Science, Social Studies, Computer Science, and Art & Craft.
Remove the 'Sanskrit' department entry from the departments array, leaving Urdu and all other subject departments unchanged.
